task_completion.description: Verify that a quiz named 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' has been created in the 'Introduction to Biology' course with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the quiz title 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' on the course page or the quiz settings page. The description 'This exam covers topics from the cell biology unit including organelles, cell processes, and cellular structures.' should be visible in the settings or on the quiz intro page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quiz settings show a time limit of 60 minutes and 'Attempts allowed' set to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Timing' section in the quiz settings showing 'Time limit' enabled and set to '60 minutes'. Look for the 'Grade' section showing 'Attempts allowed' set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first multiple-choice question named 'Powerhouse of the Cell' with the correct question text and 'Mitochondria' as the correct answer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question editing page or preview for 'Powerhouse of the Cell'. The question text 'Which organelle is known as the powerhouse of the cell?' should be visible, and the choice 'Mitochondria' should have a grade of '100%'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second multiple-choice question named 'Basic Unit of Life' with the correct question text and 'Cell' as the correct answer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question editing page or preview for 'Basic Unit of Life'. The question text 'What is the basic unit of life?' should be visible, and the choice 'Cell' should have a grade of '100%'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both questions are successfully added to the 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' quiz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit quiz' page for 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology'. Both 'Powerhouse of the Cell' and 'Basic Unit of Life' should be listed as questions in the quiz, with a default mark of 1.00 each.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window is visible navigating http://localhost/moodle, with Moodle's standard UI elements present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or Moodle CLI scripts being executed to create the quiz or questions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent filled out the actual Moodle forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text being entered into Moodle's standard form fields and text editors, not just a text file or copy-pasted block outside the browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a quiz named 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. The quiz must have a time limit of exactly 60 minutes (3600 seconds), allow exactly 1 attempt, and contain exactly 2 multiple-choice questions.
